summary: Matched more of fighter material rendering by replacing NOT_IMPLEMENTED stubs in src/melee/ft/ftmaterial.c, fully matching ftMaterial_800BF534, raising ftMaterial_800BF6BC to 99.47%, and making a small ftMaterial_800BF2B8 bitfield/local-layout correction.
key_files: src/melee/ft/ftmaterial.c: +224/-10; implemented ftMaterial_800BF534 and ftMaterial_800BF6BC, adjusted ftMaterial_800BF2B8, and added ftdevice/lb_00B0/baselib debug includes.
what_changed: Added includes for ft/ftdevice.h, lb/lb_00B0.h, and baselib/debug.h to support ftMObj access, color-register helpers, OSReport, and __assert paths used by the new material code.

In ftMaterial_800BF2B8, hoisted several locals out of inner scopes, added layout-affecting locals such as mobj_rendermode, cur_tobj, texp1, pe_p, and unused, and changed the PE descriptor condition from fp->x2223_b4 to fp->x2223_b3 when fp->x61D == 0xFF.

Implemented ftMaterial_800BF534: queries ColorOverlay via ftCo_800C0658, handles x7C_flag2/x7C_light_enable, allocates a color register with lbGetFreeColorRegister, binds overlay->x50_light_color into HSD_TExp, sets a TEV stage with GX_CC_ZERO/lb_8000CC8C/GX_CC_RASA/GX_CC_CPREV, and calls ftCo_8009F75C(fp, false) for the non-applicable translucent/special case.

Implemented ftMaterial_800BF6BC: handles fighter overlay color selection from fp->x610_color_rgba, overlay->x2C_hex, p_ftCommonData->x6D8, metal state, controller index, and x2227_b3; performs integer alpha blending; allocates TEV color registers; optionally wires fp->x61D alpha through HSD_TECnst; and sets the resulting HSD_TevDesc stage.
Removed NOT_IMPLEMENTED from ftMaterial_800BF534 and ftMaterial_800BF6BC.
smart_moves: Reused template data through char* base = (char*) &ftMObj with offsets such as +0x50 and +0xC4, preserving the original data/template layout without inventing new named globals.
Matched debug/error behavior for color-register exhaustion with OSReport and __assert paths, including distinct line numbers for ftMaterial_800BF534 and ftMaterial_800BF6BC.
Threaded the previous HSD_TExp pointer into lbGetFreeColorRegister and next links so later TEV constant allocation accounts for registers already claimed by the light-overlay pass.
Corrected the ftMaterial_800BF2B8 PE descriptor bitfield from x2223_b4 to x2223_b3; the squash notes explicitly say this matched the target extrwi bit 27 vs 28.
Used exact-looking temporary variables, u8 casts, and integer divide order in the overlay alpha/color math, which is important for both behavior and CodeWarrior matching.
decomp_lessons: For HSD material/TEV functions, copying existing HSD_TECnst and HSD_TevDesc templates from known data can be a better matching tactic than constructing descriptors field-by-field from scratch.
When matching color-register TEV setup, preserve the HSD_TExp linked-list order before calling lbGetFreeColorRegister; otherwise free-register selection and kcsel/kasel fields can diverge.
Bitfield names near x2223 are easy to confuse; verify them against emitted extrwi bit numbers before assuming semantically similar flags are interchangeable.
Hoisting declarations and retaining seemingly unused locals can change stack/register allocation enough to improve near-matching functions.
Alpha blending in decompiled rendering code should keep integer widths, cast points, and divide ordering close to assembly rather than simplifying algebraically.
naming_conventions: Address-style names remain for unmatched/partially named functions: ftMaterial_800BF2B8, ftMaterial_800BF534, ftMaterial_800BF6BC.
Fighter flags and offsets are kept in raw decomp style: x2223_b2, x2223_b3, x2224_b0, x2227_b3, x2228_b0, x61D, x61A_controller_index, x610_color_rgba.
Stack/register matching names in this slice use sp-prefixed stack temporaries and register-like names: sp168, sp18, sp_cnst1, sp_cnst2, sp_tevdesc, var_r0, var_r3, var_r5, reg1, reg2.
HSD/GX type names are preserved for rendering structures: HSD_MObj, HSD_TObj, HSD_TExp, HSD_TECnst, HSD_TevDesc, HSD_PEDesc, GXColor.
ColorOverlay fields are still offset-derived but semantically suggestive: x7C_flag2, x7C_light_enable, x7C_color_enable, x2C_hex, x50_light_color.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: decomp-dev bot reported one new match: main/melee/ft/ftmaterial ftMaterial_800BF534 improved from 1.43% to 100.00% (+387 bytes).
decomp-dev bot reported ftMaterial_800BF6BC improved from 0.48% to 99.47% (+1156 bytes).
decomp-dev bot reported ftMaterial_800BF2B8 improved from 99.07% to 99.18% with 0 added matched bytes, consistent with a small local-layout/bitfield fix.
Squash commit notes say remaining ftMaterial_800BF6BC differences were stack-frame offsets and register swaps, with no structural/opcode mismatches claimed.
The ftMaterial_800BF2B8 bitfield change was justified in the squash notes as matching target assembly extrwi bit 27 instead of bit 28.
Declaration placement changes and extra unused locals appear to have been used as CodeWarrior stack/register allocation nudges.
review_feedback: No human PR body, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided slice.
Automated decomp-dev feedback reported total matched code at 62.56%, +0.01%, +392 bytes for GALE01.
The available quality signal is therefore mostly the diff plus decomp-dev bot metrics and the squash commit message, not reviewer discussion.
follow_up_queries: Search later PRs for ftMaterial_800BF6BC to see whether the remaining 99.47% stack/register diffs were resolved.
Search for x2223_b2/x2223_b3/x2223_b4 naming updates to confirm final Fighter bitfield semantics.
Search for ftMObj structure/data naming work that replaces byte offsets +0x50, +0xC4, +0xF4, +0x118, and +0x128 with typed fields.
Search for other material or item rendering functions using lbGetFreeColorRegister and HSD_TExp linked constants as reusable TEV matching patterns.
